name: Locus Ralph Loop
author: JupiterTheWarlock
summary: A Locus plugin prototype for running a Ralph-style goal loop from a view, skill, and guardrail rule.
description: Locus Ralph Loop packages a standalone Locus View, a Skill, and a guardrail Rule for experimenting with an external Ralph-style loop around Locus workflows. It is intended as a project-independent prototype for goal-loop orchestration research.
